_comment.offset_x: along-probe offset from sensor to tip
_comment.offset_y: horizontal offset from sensor to probe center (keep at 0)
_comment.offset_z: horizontal offset from sensor to probe center (keep at 0)
_comment.minimum_contact_force: (NOT USED) the force threshold, above which we have contact
_comment.pressure_device_port: The USB device port for the pressure sensor
_comment.contact_require_f1: Whether force sensor 1 is required to be above minimum_contact_force
_comment.contact_require_f2: Whether force sensor 2 is required to be above minimum_contact_force
_comment.contact_require_f3: Whether force sensor 3 is required to be above minimum_contact_force
_comment.contact_require_f4: Whether force sensor 4 is required to be above minimum_contact_force
